name: Web app shell & UI foundation
description: Create the apps/web shell with routing, base layout, Tailwind/shadcn integration, shared form primitives, toast handling, and authenticated/unauthenticated page scaffolding needed for the MVP flows.
evidence: apps/web/src/router.tsx, apps/web/src/app.tsx, apps/web/src/main.tsx, apps/web/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx, apps/web/src/test/setup.ts; verified with pnpm --filter web lint, pnpm --filter web test, pnpm --filter web typecheck, and pnpm --filter web build
